clusters.justification: Captures generalized emotional, autonomic, and interoceptive processing spanning valence and arousal, primarily subtended by insular, amygdalar, and anterior cingulate cortices.
Represents incentive-salience, neuroeconomic assessment, and goal-directed decision-making supported by mesolimbic-striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.
Encompasses internally-directed, abstract representational processes regarding the self and others, mapping cohesively onto the default mode network.
